name: AI Business Automation Audit
helps: Service businesses with manual intake, follow-up, scheduling, estimate, reminder, or content handoff work.
deliverables: Workflow map, bottleneck notes, automation opportunities, approval points, and 30-day action plan.

name: AI Website SEO + AI Visibility Audit
helps: Service businesses that want public website pages to be clearer for people, Google, and AI answer engines.
deliverables: Service-page clarity review, FAQ gaps, proof/trust signal review, CTA clarity, and 30-day visibility plan.

name: Automation + AI Visibility Bundle
helps: Owners who need one workflow automation plan and a clearer website story at the same time.
deliverables: Automation audit plus AI visibility audit combined into one prioritized 30-day plan.
